name: yzmir-pytorch-engineering
description: PyTorch 2.9+ mastery - torch.compile (modes/dynamic/fullgraph), torch.amp (BF16/FP16/FP8), FSDP1/FSDP2 (fully_shard, MixedPrecisionPolicy), DTensor + device_mesh, FlexAttention, scaled_dot_product_attention, CUDA Graphs, NVTX/Nsight, torch.profiler, channels_last, expandable_segments. 8 reference sheets + 1 router, 3 commands, 2 agents.
